insight: Three of your last four major relapses started at the poker table — you've now named the pattern and set a concrete experiment for Friday: zero beers, home by midnight. Today's gym + deep work + weekly planning is exactly the right reset; protect sleep tonight to keep the momentum real.
priorities: Green cornerstone habits today: gym ✓, deep work ✓, sleep on time, eat clean, meditate
Lock down vision/goals system in app (weekly career goal)
Document consumption channels and define explicit rules (todos #40, #41)
Separate office from sleep space — move sleep to guest room (todo #8)

quote.text: Those who are not prepared for the apprehension of a great purpose should fix the thoughts upon the faultless performance of their duty, no matter how insignificant their task may appear. Only in this way can the thoughts be gathered and focused, and resolution and energy be developed, which being done, there is nothing which may not be accomplished.
quote.author: James Allen
